# FastestHR - Next-Gen Workforce OS

The modern, hyper-optimized HR platform engineered for scaling enterprises.

## Core Features
- Neural HR: AI-driven talent acquisition.
- Zero-Trust Payroll: Secure financial operations.
- Real-Time Performance: Continuous feedback loops.
- Workforce Matrix: Data-driven organizational management.

## Key Sections
- [Landing Page](https://fastesthr.com/) - Platform overview.
- [Intelligence Log (Blog)](https://fastesthr.com/blog) - Technical discourse on HR and AI.
- [Security](https://fastesthr.com/legal/security) - Zero-trust architecture details.
- [Legacy Comparison](https://fastesthr.com/vs/legacy-hrms) - Performance benchmarking against traditional HRMS.

## Performance Benchmarks
- Data Sync: < 1ms
- UI Response: < 100ms
- AI Recommendation Accuracy: 94.2%

## Technical Details
This platform is built as a single-page application using React, Vite, and Supabase. It uses a multi-tenant architecture with support for subdomains.
